purpose: V2 multi-axis PAPO BASE PASS at k=3 (66c0d35c) → fine-tune (TRAINED) translation analytic ceiling pre-register. raw#12 frozen. real measurement은 TRAINED p1 lasttoken forward 후 (별도 cycle, GPU 필요).

BASE_substrate_finding_recap.lasttoken_vs_bwm: lasttoken k=3 PASS, bwm k=5 PASS — lasttoken multi-axis 강함

scenario_A_LoRA_with_PAPO_loss_term.description: LoRA fine-tune training loss에 multi-axis PAPO regularization 추가 — top-3 PCA paired-axis 거리 최소화 항.
scenario_A_LoRA_with_PAPO_loss_term.formal: L_total = L_LM + lambda_papo * sum_{t=1..k} ||H @ u_t||^2  where u_t = top-k PCA right singular vectors of D
scenario_A_LoRA_with_PAPO_loss_term.ceiling_estimate: TRAINED SMA_lift expected in [0.18, 0.25] — BASE PAPO에서 +0.213 도달했으므로 fine-tune time direct optimization이 비슷한 magnitude 도달 가능. 단 TRAINED model은 학습으로 다른 representations 가지므로 PCA axes도 변함 → exact translation 보장 안 됨.
scenario_A_LoRA_with_PAPO_loss_term.verdict_likely: PASS_LIKELY at lambda_papo > critical (frozen value undetermined)

scenario_B_LoRA_without_PAPO.description: current r6/r8 r9 LoRA fine-tune — paired binding을 explicit하게 학습 안 함
scenario_B_LoRA_without_PAPO.ceiling_estimate: BASE → TRAINED ΔSMA_lift = +0.004 (current measurement, an11_v1v2v3_base_vs_trained_p1.json). TRAINED p1 lasttoken에서 V2 lift는 BASE −0.113 + 0.004 ≈ −0.109 (FAIL).
scenario_B_LoRA_without_PAPO.verdict_likely: FAIL_PRESERVED — current LoRA paradigm으로는 V2 PASS 불가, PAPO 또는 등가 lever 필수

scenario_C_Mk_IX_L_IX_with_V_sync.description: Mk.IX L_IX의 V_sync 항이 cross-token coherence를 강화 — paired binding의 indirect lever
scenario_C_Mk_IX_L_IX_with_V_sync.ceiling_estimate: expected SMA_lift in [0.18, 0.19] (mk_ix_l_ix_4tuple_ceiling_prereg_20260425.json). PAPO k=3 (+0.213)보다 낮음 — V_sync는 indirect, PAPO는 direct.

scenario_D_Mk_X_T10_13_atom_binding.description: Mk.X T10-13 atoms이 EN↔KO bilingual binding을 weight-level로 ossify
scenario_D_Mk_X_T10_13_atom_binding.ceiling_estimate: expected SMA_lift in [0.20, 0.30] (mk_x_t10_13_4tuple_ceiling_prereg_20260425.json). training-time direct binding으로 PASS likely.

papo_loss_term_lambda_critical.estimate: 단일 axis PAPO BASE +0.164 (88% gap), multi-axis k=3 +0.213 (PASS). fine-tune이 BASE PAPO와 동등 효과 내려면 lambda_papo가 PAPO equivalent strength.
papo_loss_term_lambda_critical.upper_bound_lambda: 10.0 (over-regularize 시 LM loss 급증, training collapse 위험)
papo_loss_term_lambda_critical.frozen_recommendation: next forward cycle에서 lambda sweep 사전 등록 (e.g., {0.1, 0.3, 1.0, 3.0, 10.0}, 5 runs)

measurement_protocol_pre_registered: 1. r9 또는 등가 forward cycle에서 TRAINED p1 lasttoken h_last 추출
2. tool/an11_b_v2_papo_multi_axis.hexa 그대로 적용 (BASE 측정과 동일 metric)
3. k=3, alpha=1.0 frozen run (BASE 결과와 직접 비교)
5. ceiling 안이면 spec confirmed, 밖이면 spec revision (raw#12 new revision, old ceiling 보존)
decision_priority_post_prereg: P1: r9 launch 시 TRAINED p1 lasttoken forward (BASE-equivalent, 16 prompts)
P3: SMA_lift_TRAINED 보고 + ceiling fit 검증
P4: ceiling 외 시 root cause analysis (LoRA 한계? PAPO 미적용?)

raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — analytic ceiling 명시, real measurement 미수행 명시, scenario A-D 모두 추정값 (range)으로 제시
raw_compliance.raw_12_cherry_pick_proof: satisfied — ceiling ranges frozen 2026-04-25, post-hoc tuning 금지, lambda sweep 사전 등록
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for V2 fine-tune translation ceiling
raw_compliance.raw_37_38_omega_saturation_cycle: design (BASE PAPO finding analytic extension) → impl (this state SSOT) → fixpoint marker
